list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat: production hardening, role split, bootstrap seeder, and test expansion
- Fix floating promises, throttle guard leak, URL varchar→text, duplicate logs - Add Helmet, .env.example, composite indexes, pagination, seeder - Split admin/customer roles; admin manages keys, customer manages links - 5 new test files (48 tests); rewrite Redis tests with ioredis mock - Replace process.env with ConfigService; add customCode validation - Update README, .gitignore, lint/prettier cleanup

task.summary: feat: progressing in making project product ready
feat: some bugs fixed in analytics and auth and link service and controllers

feat: production hardening, role split, bootstrap seeder, and test expansion
- Fix floating promises, throttle guard leak, URL varchar→text, duplicate logs - Add Helmet, .env.example, composite indexes, pagination, seeder - Split admin/customer roles; admin manages keys, customer manages links - 5 new test files (48 tests); rewrite Redis tests with ioredis mock - Replace process.env with ConfigService; add customCode validation - Update README, .gitignore, lint/prettier cleanup

MESSAGE.value: feat: progressing in making project product ready
feat: some bugs fixed in analytics and auth and link service and controllers

feat: production hardening, role split, bootstrap seeder, and test expansion
- Fix floating promises, throttle guard leak, URL varchar→text, duplicate logs - Add Helmet, .env.example, composite indexes, pagination, seeder - Split admin/customer roles; admin manages keys, customer manages links - 5 new test files (48 tests); rewrite Redis tests with ioredis mock - Replace process.env with ConfigService; add customCode validation - Update README, .gitignore, lint/prettier cleanup

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat: production hardening, role split, bootstrap seeder, and test expansion
- Fix floating promises, throttle guard leak, URL varchar→text, duplicate logs - Add Helmet, .env.example, composite indexes, pagination, seeder - Split admin/customer roles; admin manages keys, customer manages links - 5 new test files (48 tests); rewrite Redis tests with ioredis mock - Replace process.env with ConfigService; add customCode validation - Update README, .gitignore, lint/prettier cleanup
